## Infographic: Economic Benefits of Immigration in Canada

- Canada is built on immigration: worker-to-retiree ratio: 2 to 1 in 2035 versus 7 to 1 in 1971 = 80% of Canada’s population growth

- Best and brightest: Canada is #1 in the world attracting: entrepreneurs highly educated people

- Active community members: 1 out of 3 immigrants volunteers 2 out of 3 immigrants are part of social organizations
- 1 out of 3 immigrants volunteers
- 2 out of 3 immigrants are part of social organizations
- Creates new jobs: Global Skills Strategy has: Grown 1,100 Canadian companies Filled 24,000 highly skilled vacancies Created 60,000 new jobs for Canadians
